name: HEX_RUNS
description: The table stores the individual run details for each extract.

columns.Name: EXT_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: The column contains the corresponding JOB_ID value from the table HEX_JOBS.

columns.Name: OUTPUT_STORE
columns.Comments: The column stores the name of the output table which stores the final xml

columns.Name: OUTPUT_FRAGMENT_CNT
columns.Comments: This column contains the number of output fragments generated

columns.Name: RUN_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the Run Name

columns.Name: EXT_DEFINITION_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the Extract definition ID

columns.Name: FLOW_TASK_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the Flow Task Instance ID

columns.Name: FLOW_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the current flow instance id.

columns.Name: PAY_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the corresponding request id of the flow instance.

columns.Name: EXT_PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: The column indicates the parameters used by the run of the extract.

columns.Name: EXT_PARAMETERS_EXTEND
columns.Comments: The column indicates the extended parameters used by the run of the extract.

columns.Name: REPORT_CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the report category id for the current run.

columns.Name: EXPIRY_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the eligibility of the record for purge. The date has to be entered in the format YYYYMMDD.

columns.Name: PROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: The column indicates the valid status for the current run.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the legislative data group referred to in the current run.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the legislation code derived from the Legal Entity.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the request ID of the Flow Request.

columns.Name: CONFIG_PARAM_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the configuration parameter group id.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the start date of the current run.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the end date of the current run.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the effective date of the current run.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.
